headline: Elon Musk’s X Launches Smart Cashtags for BTC, ETH, XRP, DOGE, MSTR, COIN, Others
summary: Elon Musk’s X has officially debuted Smart Cashtags for stocks and crypto. This new feature adds interactive, real-time financial data to users’ timelines. It supports major crypto and stocks cashtags such as BTC, ETH, XRP, SOL, DOGE, TSLA, MSTR, and COIN. The Smart Cashtags feature is currently available on iPhone in the US and Canada.

headline: Tesla’s Robot Pivot And FSD Progress Test A High-Valuation Story
summary: Tesla (NasdaqGS:TSLA) is halting production of its Model S and Model X to convert factory capacity to build the Optimus humanoid robot. The company is planning mass production of Optimus at its Shanghai Gigafactory, targeting output of one million robots per year. Tesla’s Full Self-Driving (FSD) has received regulatory approval in the Netherlands and is under review for broader European clearance. Tesla has long been known for electric vehicles and energy products, but this pivot places...

headline: Elon Musk Hits Out At 'Tesla Killers' As EV Giant Outsells Rivals GM, Ford, Rivian In US
summary: Tesla Inc. CEO Elon Musk hit back at critics on Monday as the EV giant outsold all of its rivals in the U.S. domestic market during the first quarter of 2026. Tesla’s Q1 U.S. Sales In a post on the social media platform X on Monday, influencer Sawyer Merritt shared sales figures for almost all EVs available in the U.S. market, citing Cox Automotive data. The post shared how Tesla’s Model Y and Model 3 remained at the top of the sales charts with over 101,000 sales combined in the first quarter.

content.title: Elon Musk Hits Out At 'Tesla Killers' As EV Giant Outsells Rivals GM, Ford, Rivian In US
content.summary: Tesla Inc. CEO Elon Musk hit back at critics on Monday as the EV giant outsold all of its rivals in the U.S. domestic market during the first quarter of 2026. Tesla’s Q1 U.S. Sales In a post on the social media platform X on Monday, influencer Sawyer Merritt shared sales figures for almost all EVs available in the U.S. market, citing Cox Automotive data. The post shared how Tesla’s Model Y and Model 3 remained at the top of the sales charts with over 101,000 sales combined in the first quarter.

headline: Stocks Spring Forward in Record-Breaking Day
summary: Buoyed by big gains from the likes of Microsoft and Tesla, the S&P 500 rose 0.8% to 7022.95–rallying into the close to finish comfortably above its previous all-time high set in January.  Technology stocks were the big outperformers.

content.title: Stocks Spring Forward in Record-Breaking Day
content.summary: Buoyed by big gains from the likes of Microsoft and Tesla, the S&P 500 rose 0.8% to 7022.95–rallying into the close to finish comfortably above its previous all-time high set in January.  Technology stocks were the big outperformers.

headline: Tech Stocks Power S&P 500 and Nasdaq to Records
summary: Surging tech stocks carried the S&P 500 and Nasdaq composite to new records on Wednesday, a milestone in major indexes’ rebound from war-fueled losses.  Buoyed by big gains from the likes of  Microsoft  and  Tesla  the S&P 500 rose 0.8% to 7022.95—rallying into the close to finish comfortably above its previous all-time high set in January.  More recently, though, investors have grown increasingly confident that the U.S. and Iran will eventually reach a peace deal.

headline: Tesla Just Scored an FSD Win in Europe. What Does That Mean for TSLA Stock?
summary: Dutch regulators became the first in Europe to approve Tesla's FSD Supervised. Here's what that means for TSLA stock and the company's autonomous future.

headline: Tesla redefined the American road. Where does Elon Musk go from here?
summary: Tesla, the electric vehicle company owned by Elon Musk, has changed the way car-loving Americans drive. But it faces internal and external challenges.
